cards.back: Artificial Neural Networks (ANN) are computational models inspired by the structure and function of biological neural networks
There are three main types of Artificial Neural Networks: Feedforward Networks, Recurrent Networks, and Convolutional Networks

cards.front: Popular Applications of Artificial Neural Networks
cards.back: Artificial Neural Networks have applications in Image Recognition, Natural Language Processing, Speech Recognition, and Predictive Modeling
The advantages of Artificial Neural Networks include their ability to learn, adapt, and generalize from data, making them suitable for complex tasks
The disadvantages of Artificial Neural Networks include their high computational requirements, sensitivity to noise and outliers, and difficulty in interpreting results
